metadata.title: ImgSplit - Precision Image Splitting Tool
metadata.description: Free online image splitting tool with drag-and-drop split lines, snap alignment, and instant download. All processing happens in your browser — your images never leave your device.

hero.description: Free online image splitting tool with drag-and-drop split lines, snap alignment, and pixel-perfect precision. Everything runs in your browser — your images never leave your device.

benefits.subtitle: Skip the bloated image editors — split images the simple way.
benefits.noPsDesc: No need to install Photoshop or learn complicated slicing tools. Just drag split lines and cut — anyone can do it.
benefits.privacyDesc: Contracts, IDs, design files — no need to upload to third-party servers. All processing happens locally in your browser.
benefits.batchDesc: Add multiple horizontal and vertical split lines at once, auto-generate grids, and download all pieces in one go.
benefits.crossPlatformDesc: No installation needed. Open your browser and go — phone, tablet, or desktop.

features.preciseDesc: Drag split lines freely with snap alignment for pixel-perfect precision.
features.privacyDesc: All processing happens in your browser. Images are never uploaded to any server.
features.downloadDesc: Download all split images as a ZIP, or save individual pieces one by one.
features.gridDesc: Add horizontal and vertical lines simultaneously to quickly create regular grids for efficient batch cropping.
features.formatDesc: Supports PNG, JPG/JPEG, and WebP. Up to 20MB per file.
features.previewDesc: See split results in real-time as you adjust line positions.

steps.step1Desc: Drag and drop or click to upload your image. Supports PNG, JPG, and WebP.
steps.step2Desc: Add horizontal or vertical split lines and drag them into position with snap alignment.
steps.step3Desc: See each split region in real-time and confirm the results meet your needs.
steps.step4Desc: Download all pieces as a ZIP, or save specific regions individually.

useCases.ecommerceDesc: Split long product images into sections for different display areas — faster page loads, better user experience.
useCases.designerDesc: Quickly export design slices without opening Photoshop — deliver assets right in your browser.
useCases.socialDesc: Split panoramas or long images into multiple tiles for grid-style posts that look professional.

cta.description: No sign-up. No installation. Just open your browser and go. Your image data is always protected.

faq.subtitle: Common questions about the image splitting tool
faq.a1: PNG, JPG/JPEG, and WebP images are supported, with a maximum file size of 20MB.
faq.q2: Will image quality be reduced after splitting?
faq.a2: No. The tool crops at the original resolution — no compression, no scaling, no quality loss.
faq.a3: Absolutely. All processing happens locally in your browser. No image data is ever uploaded to a server. Everything is cleared when you close the page.
faq.q4: How many split lines can I add?
faq.a4: Up to 20 horizontal and 20 vertical lines, allowing for very fine grid splits.
faq.q5: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a5: No. No registration, no login required. Open the page and start using it — completely free.
faq.a6: Yes — it works great on phones and tablets too.

footer.tagline: Online Image Splitting Tool — Free · Secure · Fast

upload.title: Upload Image
upload.dragHint: Drag and drop one or more images here
upload.formatHint: PNG / JPG / WebP · Max 20MB per file
upload.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Please upload PNG, JPG, or WebP images.
upload.loadFailed: Failed to load image. Please try again.
upload.fileTooLarge: File "{name}" exceeds 20MB. Consider compressing it first.
upload.totalSizeWarning: Total file size {size}MB exceeds 50MB and may cause browser slowdown.

workspace.appendFailed: Failed to load images. Please try again.
workspace.linesNotCrossing: Split lines don't intersect the image
workspace.shortcutHints: Shortcuts: Ctrl+Z Undo | Ctrl+Shift+Z Redo | Delete Remove selected line | Drag from ruler to create | Drag back to ruler to delete | Scroll to zoom | Space+drag to pan | Cmd+0 Fit | Cmd+1 100%
